bird.name: 凤头马岛鹃
bird.summary: 凤头马岛鹃（學名：Coua cristata），与科奎氏马岛鹃、红顶马岛鹃都属杜鵑科岛鹃屬，中等身型，身长大约44厘米，头冠绿灰色，蓝裸色眼睛，胸脯红褐色，嘴巴和腿部为黑色，腹部白色，紫蓝色尾翼，尾翼末端呈白色，长而尖，栖在枝头时常上下翘动。 凤头马岛鹃是马达加斯加特有的鸟类，…

locations.name: 马达加斯加
locations.summary: 马达加斯加共和国（馬達加斯加語：Repoblikan'i Madagasikara；法語：République de Madagascar），简称马达加斯加，前称马尔加什共和国，是位于非洲东南部近海的印度洋岛屿国家，领土包括世界第四大岛马…

locations.name: 卡尔·林奈
locations.summary: 卡尔·冯·林奈（瑞典語：Carl von Linné；1707年5月23日—1778年1月10日），也譯為林内、林耐，原名卡尔·林奈乌斯（Carl Linnaeus），瑞典生物学家，瑞典科学院创始人兼第一任主席。林奈奠定了现代生物学命名法…

relations.subject: 凤头马岛鹃
relations.evidence: The crested coua (Coua cristata) is a common medium-sized bird member of the cuckoo family, Cuculidae. It is endemic to Madagascar, mainly found in the coastal regions of the island. The crested coua is a weak flyer, so it will often be observed hopping from branch to branch in high canopies.{{Cite journal|last1=URANO|first1=EIICHIRO|last2=YAMAGISHI|first2=SATOSHI|last3=ANDRIANARIMISA|first3=ARISTIDE|last4=ANDRIATSARAFARA|first4=SOLOFO|date=2008-04-03|title=Different habitat use among three sympatric species of couas Coua cristata, C

relations.subject: 凤头马岛鹃
relations.evidence: Despite being mostly found in littoral and deciduous forests, their habitats also consist open areas like savannas and brushlands
relations.object_summary: 东非常见的开放草地与湿地边缘复合景观。

relations.subject: 凤头马岛鹃
relations.evidence: Although this species is marked as least concerned due to their stable populations, crested coua's numbers are believed to be declining due to habitat loss, degradation and hunting pressures. It is mostly hunted by humans for meat, but its main natural predators are fossas, hawks and eagles
relations.object_summary: 开发、采伐和围垦等活动导致适宜生境减少。
